resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of an algorithm that hides 20-40% of actual open slots, but the evidence only indicates that the coach sets the hiding feature at 30% and reduces it to 10% during slow periods. There is no concrete evidence of an algorithm functioning to hide the slots as required, nor is there any indication of how the slots are selected for hiding. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an algorithm that hides 20-40% of actual open slots.
